item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: The Costa Rica Service Team will have a bake sale today during the high school lunch and the 7/8 lunch. Thank you to all our grade 7 students who brought goodies! Remember to come on out to support our service team at lunch. Also, next Friday the service team will host a hot dog BBQ! Payment deadline is this sunday through school cash online, so talk to your parents today to make sure you reserve your BBQ lunch!

item.title: A message from Mme Perron.
item.description: There will be a Europe team meeting on Monday, April 27th at 10:40 in room 125. All travelers must attend as we will be discussing the May Car Wash and Yardsale and Chocolate Almond Fundraisers.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: Anyone interested in reading at the school-wide liturgy on May 5, or helping out in some other way, please see Mr. Vonesch at the chaplaincy office today

item.title: A message from 7-8 Athletics:
item.description: There will be a meeting at 9:05 in room 148 for all those interested in 7-8 Track and Field.

item.title: A message from Mr. Blake Brooks.
item.description: Congratulations to Emma and Mackenzie for capturing first place in the CDSBEO Master Chef Culinary Competition yesterday in Cornwall. Emma and Mackenzie edged out teams from across the board to claim the trophy with their scratch made Chicken Fettucine Alfredo. They worked effectively under tight timelines in a pressure packed environment. Way to go girls, we’re proud of your effort. Thanks for adding another trophy to the STA cabinet!

item.title: A message from Mr. Longval:
item.description: Spring is here and anyone interested in football that is in grade 7/8 please see Mr. Longval at 247 at the beginning of lunch.

item.title: A message from: Ms. Brennan:
item.description: Garden club members are invited to help transplant more seedlings today after school! Check our Teams page for more information.
